# Finnish Open Agent

> MCP server + CLI skills exposing Finland's open data and public-service APIs (energy,
> weather, transport, registers, civic, culture, places) as agent tools, plus a curated
> registry of other Finnish skills/MCPs. Python, uv-managed, mostly key-less.

## Docs
- [Tool reference (generated)](./docs/TOOLS.md): every MCP tool and its parameters
- [README](./README.md): overview, install, configuration
- [Architecture & plan](./PLAN.md): design and the Finnish open-data landscape
- [Agent orientation](./AGENTS.md): code map and conventions

## Skills (CLI/curl)
- [Skills index](./skills/README.md): per-domain curl playbooks

## Ecosystem
- [Community catalog (generated)](./ecosystem/CATALOG.md): other Finnish skills/MCPs
- [Registry source](./ecosystem/registry.yaml): add your project here
- [Contributing](./CONTRIBUTING.md): how to add a tool or list a project
